# Third-Party Code Policy

Do not vendor full external repositories here. Download upstream projects
separately and apply the overlays in `src-overrides/` or run the scripts in
`reconstruction/`.

Referenced projects:

- SuperSplat: https://github.com/playcanvas/supersplat
- PhysGaussian: https://github.com/XPandora/PhysGaussian
- COLMAP: https://github.com/colmap/colmap
- 3D Gaussian Splatting: https://github.com/graphdeco-inria/gaussian-splatting
- RoMa: https://github.com/Parskatt/RoMa
